# Core Networking: RouteTable

Example: `{"Operations": {"CostCenter": "42"}}` | `map[string, map[string, string]]` | No |
| `displayName` | A user-friendly name. Does not have to be unique, and it's changeable. Avoid entering confidential information. | `string` | No |
| `freeformTags` | Free-form tags for this resource. Each tag is a simple key-value pair with no predefined name, type, or namespace. | [`routeRules`](../../reference/api/core/v1beta1/index.md#kind-routetable-spec-routerules) | The collection of rules used for routing destination IPs to network devices. | `list[object]` | Yes |
| `vcnId` | The OCID (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/identifiers.htm) of the VCN the route table belongs to. | `string` | Yes |

## Sample Manifest

This example is generated from the checked-in sample manifest at `config/samples/core_v1beta1_routetable.yaml`. Replace placeholder values before applying it.

[Open the rendered sample page](../../reference/samples/core/v1beta1/routetable.md)

```yaml
#
# Copyright (c) 2021, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
# Licensed under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 as shown at http://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl.
#

#
# Replace the OCI identifiers below before running e2e.
# Update metadata.name and spec.displayName if you want to force a fresh create
# instead of reusing an existing RouteTable with the same display name in the same
# VCN.
#
apiVersion: core.oracle.com/v1beta1
kind: RouteTable
metadata:
  name: routetable-sample
spec:
  compartmentId: ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleuniqueID
  vcnId: ocid1.vcn.oc1..exampleuniqueID
  displayName: "routetable-sample"
  routeRules:
    - destination: 0.0.0.0/0
      destinationType: CIDR_BLOCK
      networkEntityId: ocid1.internetgateway.oc1..exampleuniqueID
      description: "Route internet-bound traffic through an internet gateway"
```
